'''Ebaq Control''' was the military control established by the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] at [[Ebaq 9]] in preparation for the [[Battle of Ebaq]] 9.

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Destiny's Way]]''
